name: ResearchOutput
description: A research output (publication) record from the Queen's University Belfast Pure API.

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object.

uuid.description: UUID, the primary identity of the entity.

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification.

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal.

title.description: The title of the research output (FormattedString).

type.description: Classification reference for the research output type.

peerReview.description: Whether the research output is peer reviewed.
